title: Visual Vibrance
description: An attempt at recreating the new 'Vibrant Visuals' for Iris.
body:
# ⚠️ THIS PACK IS NO LONGER ACTIVELY DEVELOPED ⚠️
Any bugs you find will not be fixed, sorry!

[![purchase me a beverage](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/jbritain)
[![discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/b9SHNcvs6c)

Shader development is hard and takes a lot of time. If you enjoy my shaders, please consider supporting my work!

# Visual Vibrance

Visual Vibrance is an attempt at recreating the upcoming "Vibrant Visuals" feature which is currently only available on the Bedrock edition of Minecraft.

Visual Vibrance is *an alpha* and since it was forked from my other pack, [Glimmer](https://modrinth.com/shader/glimmer-shaders) in a relatively short period of time, there may be bugs. You can report these to me in [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/4U3nPxTznF) or `#jbritains-shaderpacks` in [the shaderLABS Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RpzWN9S).

## Compatibility
- OpenGL 4.3+ - macOS is *not* supported, nor is the Raspberry Pi. Most modern GPUs (integrated or dedicated) should work fine.
- Iris 1.7+, OptiFine is *not* supported.

## Mod Compatibility
The following are mods that are known to cause issues.
- **Chunks Fade In** causes the shader not to compile, this is a problem with the mod and the assumptions it makes about shaders.

The source code for this pack is available [on GitHub](https://github.com/jbritain/visual-vibrance). If you are interested in contributing or assisting in the development of this shaderpack, don't hesitate to make a pull request, as I have only some interest in maintaining this pack, and it was mainly made just to see if I could recreate the look.
